#AncestryDNA raw data download
#Synthetic fixture for tests/backend/test_validate_sex_thresholds.py — XY male with
#non-PAR chrX heterozygous genotyping NOISE (issue #519). A real 46,XY male array
#always carries a small fraction of non-PAR chrX het calls; the X-het RATE (here
#3/120 = 2.5%, below the 5% hemizygous cutoff) plus a high chrY rate must classify
#as XY, not manual_review. NEVER copied from a real export; every genotype is
#hand-fabricated. >=100 non-PAR chrX and >=50 chrY probes satisfy the #363 floors.
# AncestryDNA array version: V2.0
rsid	chromosome	position	allele1	allele2
rs9000001	1	100000	A	G
rs9000002	1	200000	C	C
